chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 3678 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 15989/2017. 11.01.2018. Petitioner present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith Mashooque Ali Gopang, Clerk Litigation Branch, SPSC, Hyderabad. = Learned A.A.G. has filed the copy of interview letter issued by the Assistant Director Sindh Public Service Commission, Hyderabad, copy whereof supplied to the petitioner who after going through the said letter, does not press this petition and seeks disposal of the same. In view of the above, this petition having achieved its purpose is disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
